titleStmt.title: SII 15.198: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 198. (B.K. No. 74 of 1929-30.) TUMBIGI, MUDDEBIHAL TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone in the Rāmaliṅga temple.

This is dated the 8th year, Īśvara, Pushya śu. 10, Monday. The name of the king is not mentioned. Considering its palaeography, the inscription may be placed approximately in the 13th century. As the 8th regnal year conforms to Īśvara fitting in the reign of Yādava Rāmachandra, the date may be taken to correspond to 1277, A.D. However, Pushya happens to be a suppressed month in that year.

It records a gift of land to the god Pārśva on the occasion of the setting up of a niśidi stone in memory of the deceased Bōchuva-nāyaka. It mentions Hagaraṭagenāḍu and Bommarasa, the Prabhu of Tumbige.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
8 neya
yīsvara
saṁvatsara puṣya su 10 sō
śrīmanmahā hagaraṭage nāḍa
vīraṁṇaya gaṇapatidēvanalu tuṁbige
ya prabhu boṁmarasara khēyiya
nāyaka taṁmaya bōcuvanāyaka
maḍihidali niśidiya
kallu nirmmitavāgi haḍadu pā
riśvadēvarige koṭṭa keyi matta
ru 12 mane haṁni kayi ni
vēsaṇa maṁgaḷa mahāśrī
śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 15.198 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
